comment: "I found the detailed comparison between subpectoral and prepectoral implant-based reconstruction, as well as the in-depth discussion of autologous flap options, particularly interesting. The step-by-step surgical techniques, anatomical considerations, and management of complications provided a comprehensive understanding that was both practical and clinically relevant."
"A complex topic that is well-explained in a very organized manner."

"Overall, the course provided valuable content and practical insights. I appreciated the case-based discussions and step-by-step demonstrations. The material was relevant to my professional practice.""
"I have learnt new things. The most interesting part for me was learning about the different types of reconstructive surgery."
